channel.title: Crisis on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in Crisis on Have an average day :|

item.title: Crysis Warhead.
item.description: I just finished Crysis Warhead today. I really enjoyed it. Too bad my system was just able to get an average 20FPS on min. settings. At least I was able to see it in DX10 with physx. I can&# 146;t wait to see it in high res on max settings, someday&# 133;.
